title: Values, Types, Coercion, and Equality
description: Normalize prices, quantities, identifiers, optional fields, and validity signals from a mixed service-data feed. Learners cumulatively produce a value-normalization and validation pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish undefined, null, Boolean, Number, BigInt, String, Symbol, and object values by behavior and use.
Use typeof, Array.isArray, instanceof, and explicit predicates while accounting for their boundaries.
Predict implicit coercion and prefer explicit conversion at external data boundaries.
